evals.prompt: My Python program is throwing a KeyError, but I'm certain the key exists. Help me figure out what's causing this.
evals.expected_output: Analyze possible causes of KeyError, provide troubleshooting approach and solutions

assertions.name: Contains instrumentation step
assertions.description: Output should mention adding instrumentation or logs

assertions.name: Contains analysis step
assertions.description: Output should mention analyzing logs or viewing data

assertions.name: No direct fix
assertions.description: Should not suggest directly modifying code without first collecting data

assertions.name: Mentions cleanup step
assertions.description: Should mention that instrumentation needs to be cleaned up after debugging is complete

evals.prompt: This code occasionally has data inconsistency issues in concurrent environments. Help me debug it.
evals.expected_output: Analyze concurrency issues, find race conditions, provide fix suggestions

assertions.name: Contains instrumentation step
assertions.description: Output should mention adding instrumentation or logs

assertions.name: Contains analysis step
assertions.description: Output should mention analyzing logs or viewing data

assertions.name: Mentions three-step method
assertions.description: Should mention three-step debugging method or instrumentation-analyze-fix workflow

evals.prompt: API response times are sometimes slow. How do I find the performance bottleneck?
evals.expected_output: Provide performance analysis methods and tool suggestions to help locate slow queries or time-consuming operations

assertions.name: Contains instrumentation step
assertions.description: Output should mention adding instrumentation or logs

assertions.name: Contains performance metrics
assertions.description: Should mention timestamps, time measurement and other performance-related metrics

assertions.name: Mentions cleanup step
assertions.description: Should mention that instrumentation needs to be cleaned up after debugging is complete
